                                                        Request: 

POST http://tx.fhir.org/r4/ HTTP/1.0

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          Request: 

POST http://tx.fhir.org/r4/ HTTP/1.0
User-Agent: hapi-fhir-tooling-client
Accept-Charset: UTF-8
Accept: application/fhir+json
Content-Type: application/fhir+json;charset=UTF-8
